calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for small claims appeal/trial de novo filed Jan-22-2025 by Defendant/Appellate.

Dept. 514; Judge: Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:40:07 a.m. and concluding at 10:37:22 a.m.

Appellate/Defendant White Raven Logistics appearing by Stanislav Ivanov.
Respondent/Plaintiff Roman's 14:8 Corporation not appearing.

NOTICE OF TODAY'S HEARING WAS GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF JAN-22-2025. IT BEING 09:40 A.M., THE COURT PROCEEDS.

Court determines that today's trial should not have been calendared because the appeal was untimely.

Appelate/Defendant requests that untimliness be forgiven. Defendant presents oral argument and is examined by the Court as set forth on the record.

COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT WHITE RAVEN LOGISTICS IS A CORPORATION.

10:27 a.m. - The matter is submitted. Court renders ruling.
COURT FINDS: WEI LIN TOOK EFFORTS TO CORRERCT THE MATTER PROMPTLY. THIS WAS AN HONEST MISTAKE BY SOMEONE UNFAMILIAR WITH THE FORM. TIMELINES WERE CLEARLY STATED.

DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR RELIEF AND FORGIVENESS OF UNTIMLINESS IS DENIED.
NO FUTHER DATES SET, END OF PROCEEDINGS IN THIS COURT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-06-25 At 09:05 A.M. In Dept 514

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Continued To Mar-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Judgment Entered
